data.title: How To Earn $500 A Month From Wells Fargo Stock Ahead Of Q3 Earnings
data.description: Wells Fargo offers an annual dividend yield of 2.78%, or a quarterly dividend of 40 cents per share. Here's how you can earn $500 monthly.

data.title: Delta's Turbulent Q3: Mixed Results And Tech Troubles Cloud Holiday Outlook
data.description: Delta Air Lines reported mixed Q3 2024 results, with revenue up 1% YoY and adjusted EPS down 26%. They expect Q4 revenue growth of 2%-4%.

data.title: Trump Vs. Harris: New Poll Shows Pennsylvania May Flip As Vice President's Support Among This Key Group Deteriorates
data.description: With the Nov. 5 election less than a month away, uncertainty over who will prevail continues to persists as voter sentiment oscillates.

data.title: Amazon Pharmacy to Double Service Areas, Offer Same-Day Medication Delivery
data.description: Amazon Pharmacy is expanding to 20 new U.S. cities by 2025, offering same-day prescription delivery for 45% of U.S. customers. Fast, affordable medication access aims to bridge healthcare gaps in underserved areas.
